title: Child Abuse Medical Evaluations - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Child Abuse Medical Evaluations 15 Matching Service Providers ABC HOUSE CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assessments, support services, medical evaluations and forensic evaluations for suspected child abuse victims. Also provides off-site therapy and counseling referrals, and advocacy services. 228 SW 5th Avenue Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Children ages 0-18 who are affected by physical or sexual abuse, at risk of being abused, or have directly experienced abuse and their families. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm, by appointment only Email (541) 926-2203 Get Directions Visit Website More Details AMANI CENTER CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assessments, support services, medical evaluations, and forensic evaluations for suspected child abuse victims. Also provides on-site and off-site therapy and counseling referrals, safety planning, advocacy services, and community training. Eligibility: Children ages 0-18 who are affected by physical or sexual abuse, at risk of being abused, or have directly experienced abuse. Families of these individuals are also eligible. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 366-4005 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BAY AREA HOSPITAL KIDS' HOPE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assessments, support services, medical evaluations and forensic evaluations. Offers advocacy services, off-site therapy and counseling referrals, community trainings, and prevention education. 1925 Thompson Road Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Ages 0-18 with suspected history of child abuse Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 226-8806 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CARES NORTHWEST Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a safe, child-friendly environment to assess children when there are concerns of physical or sexual abuse, neglect, or exposure to domestic violence. Conducts physical examinations and interviews in a comfortable setting to help children feel safe. Offers trauma-focused therapy for children and families who meet criteria. 2800 N Vancouver Avenue Suite 201 Portland, OR 97227 Eligibility: Children and youth age 18 and younger who are suspected of having been abused or neglected Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 276-9000 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CHILDREN'S ADVOCACY CENTER OF JACKSON COUNTY CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assessments, support services, medical evaluations, and forensic evaluations for suspected child abuse victims. Also provides therapy/counseling referrals, advocacy services, and community trainings. 816 W 10th Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Age 18 or younger who are alleged victims of child abuse; and non-offending family members Hours: Office Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Specialized therapy groups are scheduled at varying times. Call for information on days and times of parent groups.
